note: Performance ratchet baselines. Gates fail when current > baseline * (1 + tolerancePct/100). When a fix lands that meaningfully lowers a metric, lower its baseline in the same PR to lock the win in. Initial values measured 2026-07-04 (pnpm --filter canvas-workspace build, includes perf instrumentation).
runtimeNote: Counter gates for perf:scenarios (deterministic, node-count independent). Current maxima document today's known amplifiers: typing produces ~1 whole nodes-array replacement per keystroke (finding I-1) and drag ~1 per pointer-move (A2). When those fixes land, lower the maxima to lock the win (typing: expect <20; drag: expect <10). Timing metrics (INP/frames/LoAF) stay informational — measured 2026-07-04 in-sandbox under xvfb: typing@100nodes INPp95 48ms, 42.9% frames >20ms; drag@100nodes INPp95 136ms.
